---
title: "The Rt. Rev. Edward White Benson"
---

## The Rt. Rev. Edward White Benson

**Dates:** (14 July 1829-11 Oct 1896)

### Description

Bishop of Truro and later Archbishop of Canterbury

### Letters

- [To Mary Yonge, June 15th 1899](../letters/3408_To_Mary_Yonge.html)
- Letter from June 16th 1894
- Letter from June 6th 1890
- Letter from April10 th [1883]
- Letter from Decr 21st 1882
- Letter from October 1, 1878

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
